OpenAI 发布 Codex 重大更新

Codex for (almost) everything | OpenAI

2026-04-16

OpenAI 发布 Codex 重大更新，支持计算机操作、图像生成、PR 审查等更多功能。Codex 现在可以操作你的电脑，与更多日常工具和应用协同工作，生成图像，记住你的偏好，从之前的操作中学习，并承担持续和可重复的工作。

阅读原文

OpenAI releases a major update to Codex, making it a more powerful partner for developers. Codex can now operate your computer, work with more tools and apps, generate images, remember preferences, learn from previous actions, and take on ongoing work.

Read the full article
